use_cases: User authentication for SaaS applications requiring email and social login
E-commerce website login pages with Google OAuth integration
Secure portal access for fintech applications
Developer tool login screens with multi-provider authentication
ai_summary: A responsive login form component featuring email input field, Google OAuth button, and clean divider with text. Designed with minimalist flat styling using gray color palette and rounded-full elements. Includes responsive image panel for desktop view and adapts to mobile screens with stacked layout.
